creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 192265
py-mkdocs-nature.shar

Hello,

attached is the shar file of the Python package py-mkdocs-nature, that is a theme for MkDocs and is a clone of the "greenish" Sphinx theme of the same
name.

It supports a number of features which are configurable by the end user:

- Theme Variables
- Search
- Code Highlighting

QA:
~~~
- poudriere (11.1-RELEASE amd64 + i386) for each py27 + py36 flavor -> OK
- portlint -> OK


Note:
Before this Python package can be added to the ports tree, the port textproc/py-mkdocs must be committed first (see also: https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=227301)
